title: Login and add one item to cart
preconditions: User has a valid Saucedemo account
Saucedemo website is accessible and loads correctly
steps: Navigate to the Saucedemo login page URL.
Enter the valid username 'standard_user' in the username input field.
Enter the valid password 'secret_sauce' in the password input field.
Locate the first item on the inventory page and click the 'Add to cart' button for that item.
Click on the shopping cart icon located in the upper right corner of the page.
expectedResult: The inventory page should be displayed without errors after login. The cart icon should display a badge with the number '1'. The added item should be visible on the cart page with its name, price, and quantity displayed as '1'.
edgeCases: Username with leading and trailing spaces (e.g., ' standard_user ').
Username with case variations (e.g., 'Standard_User', 'STANDARD_USER').
Password with leading and trailing spaces (e.g., ' secret_sauce ').
Attempting to add an item to the cart before logging in (should redirect to login).
Adding an item to the cart and then navigating away from the cart page.

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: Saucedemo website is accessible and loads correctly
steps: Navigate to the Saucedemo login page URL.
Enter an invalid username (e.g., 'invalid_user') in the username input field.
Enter an invalid password (e.g., 'wrong_password') in the password input field.
expectedResult: An error message should be displayed below the login fields, stating 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service'. The user should remain on the login page.
edgeCases: Login with a valid username and an invalid password.
Login with an invalid username and a valid password.
Login with an empty username and a valid password.
Login with a valid username and an empty password.
Login with both empty username and empty password.
Attempting SQL injection in username and password fields (e.g., ' OR '1'='1').
Attempting to log in with extremely long username/password strings.
Attempting to log in with special characters in username and password fields.

title: Add multiple items to cart
preconditions: User has a valid Saucedemo account
Saucedemo website is accessible and loads correctly
steps: Navigate to the Saucedemo login page URL.
From the inventory page, click the 'Add to cart' button for the first displayed item.
From the inventory page, click the 'Add to cart' button for the second displayed item.
Click on the shopping cart icon located in the upper right corner of the page.
Verify that both added items are present in the cart, along with their correct names, prices, and quantities.
expectedResult: The inventory page should load correctly after login. The cart icon should display a badge with the number '2'. The cart page should list both distinct items, each with a quantity of '1' and their respective prices. The total price displayed at the bottom of the cart should be the sum of the prices of these two items.
edgeCases: Add the same item to the cart twice.
Add one item, navigate away, add another item, and then check the cart.
Add multiple items and then remove one item from the cart.
Add items to the cart, log out, and then log back in to verify if cart items persist.
Add items to the cart with simulated slow network responses for each 'Add to cart' action.
Add items to the cart and then immediately proceed to checkout to see if all items are included.
Add items to cart, clear browser cache/cookies, and then check cart.
Add items to cart, then try to add an item that is out of stock (if applicable).
